title: CleanSpark (CLSK) Bitcoin Holdings and Treasury Status
text: CleanSpark (CLSK) holds significant Bitcoin treasury assets. The company now ranks as the ninth-largest Bitcoin holder among public firms. CleanSpark (CLSK) Bitcoin holdings total approximately 13,099-13,561 BTC tokens worth around $925 million to $1.0 billion depending on the reporting period. The company expanded its Bitcoin treasury to over $1 billion without issuing new equity since November 2024. By the second fiscal quarter of 2026, bitcoin holdings increased 14% to $925.2 million. This treasury strategy represents a major achievement for CleanSpark as a significant Bitcoin mining company, with its operational hashrate placing it among industry leaders.
